title: Mervyn’s
subtitle: Campaign & Photography
description: A campaign and photography project for Mervyn’s focused on creating a bold visual identity, striking key visuals, and versatile brand content for digital and print use.
body: We collaborated with the client to define a visual language aligned with their brand story.
The campaign assets were designed for multi-channel usage including social, web, and print.

title: Narasha
subtitle: Website Ecommerce & Photography
description: A full e-commerce and photography engagement for Narasha, combining a conversion-focused website experience with polished product and lifestyle imagery.
body: We designed and developed an experience optimized for conversion and brand storytelling.
Photography was art-directed to highlight both product details and lifestyle usage.

title: Butter me up
subtitle: Photography
description: A photography-led project for Butter me up built around rich textures, playful composition, and imagery that makes the product feel fresh, tactile, and desirable.
body: We developed a visual system that makes the product feel tactile and craveable.
Lighting and composition were tuned to highlight textures and colors.

title: Snoop’s Joint
subtitle: Campaign & Photography
description: A campaign and photography project for Snoop’s Joint that blends strong visual storytelling, atmospheric styling, and memorable branded imagery across touchpoints.
body: We created a campaign system that works across outdoor, digital, and in‑store touchpoints.
Photography pushed a cinematic, atmospheric direction while remaining product-focused.

title: MC Foods
subtitle: Campaign & Photography
description: A campaign and photography project for MC Foods designed to showcase the range through appetizing visuals, clear product communication, and adaptable campaign assets.
body: We created key visuals and supporting assets for both retail and digital campaigns.
The photography direction focused on freshness, color, and clarity of product presentation.

title: Flora Capital
subtitle: Magzine Design
description: An editorial design project for Flora Capital focused on building a magazine experience that feels refined, readable, and aligned with the brand’s visual language.
body: We structured content layouts to support both quick scanning and deep reading.
Typography, grids, and imagery were tuned to convey trust, clarity, and modernity.

title: Smarttek
subtitle: Website & Brand
description: A website and brand project for Smarttek focused on crafting a sharp digital presence, clearer communication, and a modern visual system that feels confident and scalable.
body: We designed and built a responsive website to showcase Smarttek’s offerings.
Brand elements were refined to feel both technical and approachable.
